diagrams.title: BMS Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the three-tier architecture of Building Management Systems with sensors, controllers, and actuators connected via communication networks
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the hierarchical structure and data flow in BMS

diagrams.title: Closed-Loop Control System
diagrams.description: Feedback control loop showing how BMS maintains desired conditions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding automatic control principles in BMS

diagrams.title: BMS Control Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the different control levels from direct digital control to enterprise integration
diagrams.purpose: Understanding multi-level control and integration capabilities

diagrams.title: Energy Distribution in Buildings
diagrams.description: Pie chart showing typical energy consumption breakdown in commercial buildings
diagrams.purpose: Identifying major energy consumers for BMS optimization focus
